rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that stamping 'Copyright (c) 2026 Lean FRO, LLC' (line 2) on material the file itself says is adapted from Meta/Atlas (lines 11-13) creates a real attribution/copyright conflict; acting on that finding improves the PR. Review 1 only checks whether the source is named somewhere in prose, missing the header-level copyright inconsistency that is plainly visible in the diff.
